message: Node started: Conduct a deep dive into theoretical physics literature (specifically focusing on quantum optics and black hole thermodynamics) to identify the three universal dimensionless constants that govern the classicality of single-photon Hawking radiation. Search for specific parameters related to the photon statistics, the Wigner function negativity, or the transition from quantum to classical regimes in Hawking radiation. Once identified, provide their exact numerical values and the names/symbols associated with them.
